title: Record shared-term branch filtering in the TUI demo
description: Demonstrate how shared filter terms narrow the branch list while keeping the selected work item context visible in the generated VHS assets.

title: Keep matching feature branches visible while refining the filter
description: Use a second filterable branch so the tape clearly shows that multiple matching branches remain visible until the filter becomes more specific.

title: Show parsed branch IDs resolving to Azure DevOps-style details
description: This synthetic item anchors the default branch selection so the details pane immediately shows a realistic title, state, assignee, and description for the parsed work item number.

title: Demonstrate origin branch loading from a local demo remote
description: Used when toggling to the origin branch list so the GIF shows remote work item loading without relying on a real networked remote.

title: Load remote branch details from local Azure DevOps fixtures
description: Demonstrate that remote branch selections still resolve to Azure DevOps-style work items when the app runs in demo mode.

title: Polish the reproducible VHS capture workflow
description: Reserve one more synthetic item for a release-style branch so the fixture set covers more than one work item type and state while still looking coherent in the demo.
